positive: A stylized, hand-drawn illustration of a celestial map showing constellations and mythological beasts (like a griffin and a unicorn) connected by glowing cosmic lines. Dark midnight blue background, gold ink accents, tarot card aesthetic, etching style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern, photo, digital painting, overly bright
